summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Monday Knights website after GitHub code update - all core features and integrations working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly (200 status)
About Us content API returning proper Action Aid Community text
Blog posts API working correctly (found test post created during testing)
Individual contact form submission API working (201 status, UUID returned)
Business contact form submission API working (201 status, UUID returned)
Admin login API authentication working with provided credentials
Protected admin endpoints (individual/business contacts) working correctly
Blog post creation API working for authenticated users
Homepage loads correctly with Monday Knights artistic branding and background
All three menu items visible and clickable (About Us, Contact Us, Events and Announcements)
About Us overlay opens correctly with Action Aid Community content
Contact Us overlay opens with proper sub-menu structure
Subscribe to Email List option leads to individual/business contact forms
Individual contact form displays all required fields (name, email, phone, message)
Business contact form displays all required fields (business name, contact person, email, phone, message)
Follow Us section displays correctly with Instagram integration
Instagram link properly configured (https://www.instagram.com/monday_knights_nyc/)
Events and Announcements overlay opens with header image
Events section displays blog posts created through admin (test post visible)
Admin panel accessible at /admin route with proper login form
Admin authentication working with credentials (MondayKnightsNYC@proton.me)
Admin dashboard loads with all three tabs (About Us, Events & Posts, Contact Submissions)
About Us tab shows content editor with current text and update functionality
Events & Posts tab shows creation form and existing posts with edit/delete options
Contact Submissions tab displays both individual (4) and business (1) contact entries
All admin functionality properly secured and working
Contact form integration between frontend and backend working seamlessly
All overlays open and close properly with functional close buttons
